symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $462.12 up 6.94% with price above all EMAs including EMA21 at $424.93 and EMA200 at $339.47 while sitting 0.7% below 52-week high of $465.38. Setup shows Stage2 6/7 with RS 100.0 and confirmed uptrend structure. Strong positioning as key AI chip foundry with capacity expansion and consistent revenue growth highlighted across discussions.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM $462.12에 마감하며 EMA21 $424.93 EMA200 $339.47 위에 위치 52주 고점 대비 0.7% 하회. Stage2 6/7 RS 100.0 업트렌드 구조 확인. AI 칩 파운드리로서 생산능력 확대와 안정적 매출 성장 논의가 소셜에서 두드러짐.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $210.69 up 2.95% with price above EMA21 $210.30 and EMA200 $188.25 yet structure shows DOWNTREND. Stage2 7/7 but RS only 63.4 limits conviction. Jensen Huang's 5-layer AI strategy comments and Nvidia's $25B bond sale with $85B+ demand are widely shared.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA $210.69에 마감 EMA21 $210.30 EMA200 $188.25 위지만 구조 DOWNTREND. Stage2 7/7이나 RS 63.4로 확신 제한. Jensen Huang 5층 AI 전략 발언과 $25B 채권 발행 $85B 수요 논의 확산.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Retest of golden cross zone near EMA50 $206.76

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $577.22 up 1.70% trading below EMA21 $594.75 and EMA200 $636.92 with Stage2 only 2/7 and RS 13.8. Structure remains ACCUMULATION with volume contraction. Strong ad business momentum and AI infrastructure investments viewed as attractive for long-term holders.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: META $577.22에 마감 EMA21 $594.75 EMA200 $636.92 아래 거래 Stage2 2/7 RS 13.8. ACCUMULATION 구조 거래량 수축. 광고 사업 모멘텀과 AI 인프라 투자 장기 보유 매력으로 평가.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Accumulation base near current levels with volume expansion
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: 현재 구간 거래량 확대 시 매집 기반 형성

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $400.49 up 1.04% sitting below EMA21 $407.71 yet above EMA200 $396.78 with DOWNTREND structure and Stage2 4/7. RS 36.8 adds caution. Discussions center on Tesla's strong balance sheet, AI/robotics initiatives, FSD recurring revenue, and ARK Invest buying.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Stabilization above EMA200 $396.78 for potential relief

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $128.47 down 1.65% trading below all EMAs with Stage2 1/7 and RS 0.0. Structure shows UPTREND but low Stage2 signals weakness. FAA partnership news sparks strong bullish discussion on real-world AI platform adoption and government contracts.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MSFT closed at $379.40 up 0.13% trading below all EMAs with Stage2 0/7 and RS 18.3. Structure shows UPTREND but lowest Stage2 score signals weakness. Long-term investors see the valuation pullback as an attractive entry point for Azure and AI growth despite YTD underperformance.
